name: png-jpeg-to-idx-conversion
description: Create a Python interop script converting PNG/JPEG images to IDX binary format for Mojo inference pipelines. Use when: (1) inference pipeline only accepts IDX format but users have PNG/JPEG inputs, (2) adding image-to-IDX preprocessing to ML inference examples, (3) bridging PIL/Pillow image loading into Mojo-native data formats.
